## Checklist

- [ ] I added a changeset (`bunx changeset`) for any user-facing change
- [ ] `bun run check` passes (Biome lint + format)
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] Behavior that branches per dialect has coverage for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite
- [ ] Docs / README updated if needed
